title: Intrications
description: A mod in which I rework simple things to have complex mechanics :3
body:
![The word "Intrications" in the style of the Minecraft logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iyf4xxCO/images/159c38c92797d7eb035fad6574ee76bad30635bb.png) # Mod A mod that takes simple mechanics (ex. ender pearls), and adds new more complex ways to use them (like a magic staff that lets you charge an enderpearl and teleport without worrying about damage or pearl trajectory) # Usage - You may use this mod in videos and modpacks, provided you link to this page and follow terms of the License.
- You may not port this mod to other mod loaders (Forge, Fabric, etc.)
- You may port this mod to other versions of Quilt if you contact me for permission first.
- This mod is for Quilt 1.19.2 and distributed on Modrinth. You may not redistribute or reupload this mod to any other website. (Unless you ported it to another quilt version with my permission) # Videos
